name: acm-ccs-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM CCS submissions: venue routing across the security big four, HotCRP dual-cycle submission checks, rebuttal strategy, threat-model writing, adaptive-attack evaluation, artifact evaluation with ACM badges, ethics appendices, and ACM camera-ready work. Grounded in the official CCS 2026 CFP, call for artifacts, HotCRP cycle sites, and SIGSAC pages checked on 2026-07-08.
